slots.notes: Four icons corresponding to the four cards. They are fully black 🖓 icon glyphs. Each one is about 48px. They could be anything that’s related to the card title, preferably from a icon library (Heart, Star, Lightbulb, Smile – or how about four frequently used state/mood icons in one font). They are rendered via currentColor with no stroke—fill only. Safest to pick for inline SVG or a glyph from an icon library (Lucide React). Note: they are on a black background, so use firely contrasty designs.

The label of the button that reads 'Demo', or something at the bottom of each card that lets the user know there’s more. It’s not necessarily a button – it could be a link, a prompt, an accent text snppet. But call it 'Demo' in the context. It is a text that invites the user to interact. Each card has a text at the bottom denoting the call-to-action/Explore/Demo for that card.

mechanic: A simple 4-card section. Each card has an icon on top, a heading, body, and a 'Demo' button at the bottom. The cards are in a responsive grid. Staggered on scroll (useInView opacity) with Framer Motion. Solid, dark theme.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript component. Tailwind CSS 3 using arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.@@ Base Layer or simple default export.
reskinNotes: This is a placeholder for benchmarks and case studies. The cards are hardcoded with dummy data - testimonials, benchmarks, and user cases. The icons are probably from Lucide React. Replace with real data when ready. All colors are inline literals - there are no CSS variables.
